description: MCP server definitions for Solana DeFi agents deployed on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.

servers.name: solana-rpc
servers.description: Solana RPC connection for on-chain queries and transaction submission.

servers.name: jupiter-aggregator
servers.description: Jupiter DEX aggregator for token swap quoting and execution on Solana.

servers.name: solana-token-metadata
servers.description: Solana token metadata and DAS API for token information retrieval.

tools.name: getTokenSupply
tools.description: Get token supply for a mint address

servers.name: birdeye-market-data
servers.description: Birdeye API for Solana token prices, market data, and analytics.

servers.name: spl-token
servers.description: SPL Token CLI wrapper for token account operations.

servers.name: metaplex-core
servers.description: Metaplex Core protocol for NFT and digital asset management on Solana.

servers.name: phoenix-perps
servers.description: Phoenix perpetual futures DEX for leveraged trading on Solana.

tools.name: placeOrder
tools.description: Place a limit or market order

servers.name: defi-protocol-analyzer
servers.description: DeFi protocol data aggregator for TVL, APY, and protocol metrics.

servers.name: helius-rpc-enhanced
servers.description: Helius enhanced RPC for webhook, DAS, and advanced Solana queries.

tools.name: tokenBalances
tools.description: Get token balances for an address
